subject: Migration of the healthchecks to gerrit
commit_message:
Migration of the healthchecks to gerrit

Changes to set default directory for results if None

Issue-ID: INT-2226
Signed-off-by: pawel.denst <pawel.denst@external.t-mobile.pl>
Change-Id: I5337a55f3271ebb5e58298e1fb1aa3b665713909

Patch Set 7:

That can't be run locally I think
Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "/home/ubuntu/onap/repos/integration_repos/pythonsdk-tests/run_status.py", line 3, in <module>
    status.run()
  File "/home/ubuntu/onap/repos/integration_repos/pythonsdk-tests/src/onaptests/scenario/status.py", line 145, in run
    os.makedirs(self.res_dir, exist_ok=True)
  File "<frozen os>", line 215, in makedirs
  File "<frozen os>", line 215, in makedirs
  File "<frozen os>", line 225, in makedirs
PermissionError: [Errno 13] Permission denied: '/var/lib/xtesting'
How to test it?
